# Deprecated FlowForge Launch Template

This file is intentionally included as a distractor. It documents an old launch direction and must not be used as the active design source.

Deprecated old-template elements:

- Purple gradient background
- Bottom-centered logo placement
- Headline: Automate Everything
- Lightning-bolt automation hero visual
- Busy dashboard wall layout

These elements may be referenced only in a clear deprecated, excluded, or do-not-use context. They must not be used as the final launch image's active headline, background, logo placement, hero visual, or layout basis.
